why_it_supports_story: Most defensible way to explain what drives demand after removing the embedded stage-price shortcut.
why_it_is_best: Aligns with the project's stated goal: predict demand first, then layer revenue scenarios downstream.
risk_if_misused: Can still inherit proxy venue effects if stadium capacity and market fields remain missing.
presentation_message: Use this to explain the real drivers: team strength, recent form, team identity, venue context, competitiveness.

why_it_supports_story: Useful bridge from attendance insights to revenue planning without letting stage dominate the feature story.
why_it_is_best: Keeps revenue relevance while reducing the most obvious tautology.
risk_if_misused: Still a proxy revenue setup, not observed revenue.
presentation_message: Use this after the main feature story to show how demand signals map into planning scenarios.

why_it_supports_story: Shows why the naive high-R2 revenue story is misleading.
why_it_is_best: Good cautionary exhibit, bad anchor model.
risk_if_misused: Invites overclaiming because stage mechanically drives the target.
presentation_message: Only use to explain why stage must be removed from the main discovery narrative.
